framing_note: All poses use upper-body or three-quarter framing to match existing avatar style

poses.name: standing_neutral
poses.prompt: standing upright facing forward, arms relaxed at sides, neutral confident expression

poses.name: sitting
poses.prompt: seated on an office chair, hands resting on lap, relaxed professional posture

poses.name: walking
poses.prompt: mid-stride walking pose, one arm slightly forward, dynamic movement

poses.name: pointing_forward
poses.prompt: right arm extended forward with index finger pointing at the viewer, assertive expression

poses.name: arms_crossed
poses.prompt: both arms folded across chest, confident stance, slight smile

poses.name: thinking
poses.prompt: one hand on chin in thoughtful pose, eyes looking slightly upward, contemplative expression

poses.name: presenting
poses.prompt: one arm extended to the side with open palm, presenting or introducing something, friendly expression

poses.name: gesturing_both_hands
poses.prompt: both hands raised at chest level making expressive gestures, animated speaking pose

poses.name: leaning_casual
poses.prompt: slight lean to one side, relaxed casual posture, one hand in pocket or at side, easygoing expression

poses.name: celebrating
poses.prompt: both arms raised overhead in celebration, big happy smile, victory pose

poses.name: waving
poses.prompt: one hand raised in a friendly wave, warm welcoming smile, open body language

poses.name: thumbs_up
poses.prompt: one hand giving a thumbs up, approving smile, positive energy

poses.name: looking_at_device
poses.prompt: holding and looking down at a phone or tablet in both hands, focused expression

poses.name: writing_typing
poses.prompt: hands positioned as if typing on a keyboard or writing with a pen, concentrating expression

poses.name: explaining_open_palms
poses.prompt: both hands open with palms facing up at waist level, explaining or offering gesture, engaged expression

poses.name: confident_hands_on_hips
poses.prompt: hands on hips, chest forward, confident powerful stance, determined expression

poses.name: listening
poses.prompt: head slightly tilted to one side, attentive listening expression, hands clasped or at sides

poses.name: surprised_excited
poses.prompt: wide eyes, open mouth in surprise or excitement, hands raised near face, energetic expression

poses.name: nodding_agreeing
poses.prompt: slight forward head nod, warm approving smile, relaxed shoulders, agreeable expression

poses.name: power_pose
poses.prompt: wide stance with arms akimbo, strong authoritative posture, commanding presence
